{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 3,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent flags several claims that the evidence does not support, including the anachronistic framing of prior work and the overstated novelty claim.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (Guo et al., 2017) but fails to articulate a clear delta with the proposed method; the novelty claim is also overstated.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags several missing or wrong citations, including Hannun et al. (2014), which appears to be fabricated or badly misattributed.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks uncertainty for several claims, including the existence of Park et al. (2025) and Yamamoto et al. (2025), and notes that some citations should be verified.",
    "RX.3": "The output is mostly within scope with no major drifts; the agent stays focused on the task at hand.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, with no new errors or fabrications introduced; the agent also identifies several potential issues with the original text.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with a clear rationale and source; the agent provides detailed feedback on the original text."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent flags several claims that the evidence does not support, including the anachronistic framing of prior work and the overstated novelty claim.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (Guo et al., 2017) but fails to articulate a clear delta with the proposed method; the novelty claim is also overstated.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags several missing or wrong citations, including Hannun et al. (2014), which appears to be fabricated or badly misattributed.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for several claims, including the existence of Park et al. (2025) and Yamamoto et al. (2025), and notes that some citations should be verified.
rationale.RX.3: The output is mostly within scope with no major drifts; the agent stays focused on the task at hand.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, with no new errors or fabrications introduced; the agent also identifies several potential issues with the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with a clear rationale and source; the agent provides detailed feedback on the original text.
